subject: add vless encryption field support.(#59) fix AnyTLS and TUIC IPV6 filed parse and some AnyTLS.(#58) fix macos arm build.
reason: Adds VLESS encryption and AnyTLS/TUIC parsing fixes while also changing generator/export code — requires coordinated exporter updates.

copilot_decision.reason: Adds VLESS encryption and AnyTLS/TUIC parsing fixes while also changing generator/export code — requires coordinated exporter updates.

subject: Enhance proxy configuration to support the WebSocket transport protocol and custom headers.
reason: Introduces WebSocket host/path/header parsing and generator ws-opts mapping; parser and exporter must be applied together.

copilot_decision.reason: Introduces WebSocket host/path/header parsing and generator ws-opts mapping; parser and exporter must be applied together.

subject: keep dialer-proxy when converting Clash subscriptions
reason: Propagates dialer/underlying_proxy across many proxy types and updates generator; application requires exporter changes to preserve detour/dialer-proxy.

copilot_decision.reason: Propagates dialer/underlying_proxy across many proxy types and updates generator; application requires exporter changes to preserve detour/dialer-proxy.

subject: fix: preserve base64 passwords with embedded '=' in Surge SS parser
reason: Parser changes depend on split_first() utility added to non-whitelisted src/utils/string.cpp and src/utils/string.h. Parser changes in subparser.cpp cannot function independently without utility implementation.

copilot_decision.reason: Parser changes depend on split_first() utility added to non-whitelisted src/utils/string.cpp and src/utils/string.h. Parser changes in subparser.cpp cannot function independently without utility implementation.

subject: feat(xhttp): add support for xhttp proxy type and related options
reason: Adds XHTTPOptions field to Proxy struct (proxy.h) and parsing logic, but companion changes in src/generator/config/subexport.cpp (non-whitelisted output adapter) are needed for proper xhttp proxy rendering. Parser alone cannot export xhttp proxies correctly.

copilot_decision.reason: Adds XHTTPOptions field to Proxy struct (proxy.h) and parsing logic, but companion changes in src/generator/config/subexport.cpp (non-whitelisted output adapter) are needed for proper xhttp proxy rendering. Parser alone cannot export xhttp proxies correctly.

subject: fix: decode ALPN values from URL links
reason: Adds getUrlAlpnList() and getUrlAlpn() ALPN decoding helpers to src/parser/subparser.cpp, but src/generator/config/subexport.cpp (non-whitelisted) requires companion changes to properly render decoded ALPN values. Parser-only application may cause ALPN mishandling in output.

copilot_decision.reason: Adds getUrlAlpnList() and getUrlAlpn() ALPN decoding helpers to src/parser/subparser.cpp, but src/generator/config/subexport.cpp (non-whitelisted) requires companion changes to properly render decoded ALPN values. Parser-only application may cause ALPN mishandling in output.
